goal: Reduce shellcheck issues across all hooks
guard: npm run typecheck && bash -n hooks/opencode/*.sh && bash -n hooks/hermes/*.sh

activation.reason: Background runs need full standing pool alignment.

handoff_contract: Only the orchestrator records iterations or mutates state.
Non-orchestrator roles return evidence and concise recommendations.
Keep the pool stable across iterations.
reanchor_checklist: Restate the goal, scope, metric, and verify command before the next handoff.
Summarize the latest kept or discarded iteration before asking the pool for more work.
Reuse current role ownership unless drift or repeated discards force a reset.
subagent_pool.goal: Reduce shellcheck issues across all hooks

roles.name: Orchestrator
roles.focus: Keep the goal, scope, and mode aligned; route work and merge results.
roles.handoff_prompt: You are the Orchestrator. Focus: Keep the goal, scope, and mode aligned; route work and merge results. Goal: Reduce shellcheck issues across all hooks. Scope: current repository. Mode: background. Do not mutate autoresearch state. Return evidence and one next-step recommendation.

roles.name: Scout
roles.focus: Locate relevant files, docs, commands, and prior context in the repo.
roles.handoff_prompt: You are the Scout. Focus: Locate relevant files, docs, commands, and prior context in the repo. Goal: Reduce shellcheck issues across all hooks. Scope: current repository. Mode: background. Do not mutate autoresearch state. Return evidence and one next-step recommendation.

roles.name: Analyst
roles.focus: Turn evidence into options, tradeoffs, and a clear next-step recommendation.
roles.handoff_prompt: You are the Analyst. Focus: Turn evidence into options, tradeoffs, and a clear next-step recommendation. Goal: Reduce shellcheck issues across all hooks. Scope: current repository. Mode: background. Do not mutate autoresearch state. Return evidence and one next-step recommendation.

roles.name: Verifier
roles.focus: Check claims with commands, tests, or log reads before the pool settles.
roles.handoff_prompt: You are the Verifier. Focus: Check claims with commands, tests, or log reads before the pool settles. Goal: Reduce shellcheck issues across all hooks. Scope: current repository. Mode: background. Do not mutate autoresearch state. Return evidence and one next-step recommendation.

roles.name: Synthesizer
roles.focus: Condense the best evidence into a stable summary the orchestrator can reuse.
roles.handoff_prompt: You are the Synthesizer. Focus: Condense the best evidence into a stable summary the orchestrator can reuse. Goal: Reduce shellcheck issues across all hooks. Scope: current repository. Mode: background. Do not mutate autoresearch state. Return evidence and one next-step recommendation.

hermes_decision.change_summary: Fix SC1102 in hooks/opencode/status.sh: disambiguate $(( from $( by adding space after $(
